arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag's gripe with Cristiano Ronaldo finally revealed by ex-Man Utd coach
arts.sum: Cristiano Ronaldo had his Manchester United contract cancelled in November 2022 ahead of a switch to Al-Nassr and it has now been confirmed why Erik ten Hag was not convinced by the forward

arts.ttl: ‘Pure talent’: John Obi Mikel says Chelsea had a player who could’ve been as good as Cristiano Ronaldo
arts.sum: Chelsea have had some immensely talented players over the years. From Frank Lampard to Cole Palmer, Chelsea have had some incredible natural talents in their...

arts.ttl: Cristiano Ronaldo's 'best ever player' claim shot down as Ronaldo Nazario shares who he considers to be the real G.O.A.T
arts.sum: The Al Nassr frontman recently claimed that he is the most complete player that the game has ever seen

arts.ttl: Kieran McKenna's ‘disrespect', true Ole Gunnar Solskjaer feelings, Cristiano Ronaldo red flag
arts.sum: Kieran McKenna returned to Old Trafford with Ipswich to face Man Utd on Wednesday as he suffered a narrow 3-2 loss, but it wasn't too long ago that he was part of the Red Devils coaching set-up
